title: Jacob's Silly Spacepack
description: A Modpack meant for the minecraft server JSS but can be used for other uses!
body:
# Jacob's Silly Spacepack
This is a modpack meant for [Jacob's Silly Server](https://modrinth.com/server/jss) and can also be used for other uses!
This includes Ad Astra and a couple other mods to make the game extra fun!
